artifact_patterns.description: Project-level settings checked into source control and shared with team
notes: Key settings: permissions, model, env, apiKeyHelper, companyAnnouncements, hooks, sandbox, extraKnownMarketplaces

artifact_patterns.description: Personal project preferences not committed to version control
Project-specific instructions and context automatically loaded at startup
notes: Content: Repository etiquette, developer environment setup, project-specific behaviors
No required format; keep concise and human-readable

artifact_patterns.description: Custom slash commands for frequently-used prompts
notes: Frontmatter properties: description, allowed-tools, model, argument-hint, disable-model-invocation
Advanced features: Bash execution (! prefix), file references (@ prefix)
Frontmatter properties: name, description, tools (comma-separated or omit to inherit all), model (sonnet/opus/haiku/inherit)
Capabilities: Separate conversation history, context isolation, intelligent routing by coordinator
Enables multi-agent orchestration with coordinator model routing requests to specialized subagents

artifact_patterns.description: Reusable skill definitions that teach Claude domain-specific techniques and capabilities
notes: Supports subdirectories for organizing skills by domain
Long-form how-to guides with trigger conditions, step-by-step methodology, and validation criteria

artifact_patterns.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server definitions for project
